characters.appearance: Young female, slim build, fair complexion, long straight dark hair. Expressive facial features.
characters.wardrobe: Initially a fuzzy white sweater and black skirt, then a blue short-sleeve button-down top for the majority of the video, ending in a white sweater.

characters.appearance: Young male, slim build, fair complexion, short dark hair. Wears glasses.

scenes.scene_summary:
- Establishes the playful dynamic between the couple.
- Hooks the viewer with a relatable, lighthearted relationship goal.
- Sets up the premise of the wife wanting something from her pilot husband.
scenes.supernova_on_screen_text: पायलट पति को अपनी फ्लाइट पर ले जाने के लिए मनाना [Convincing pilot husband to take me on his flight]

scenes.supernova_script:
Character A says: दोस्तों, मेरे पति की एम्स्टर्डम की फ्लाइट है। [Friends, my husband has a flight to Amsterdam.]
Character A says: पिछली बार मैं नहीं जा पाई थी, [I couldn't go last time,]
Character A says: पर इस बार मुझे उनके साथ जाना है! [But this time I want to go with him!]
Character A says: टारगेट वहाँ है। [The target is over there.]
Character A says: आसान तो नहीं लग रहा। [It doesn't look easy.]
Character A says: पर मैं भी हार नहीं मानूंगी... [But I won't give up either...]
Character A says: एम्स्टर्डम तो देखकर ही रहूंगी! [I will definitely see Amsterdam!]
scenes.scene_summary:
- Introduces the main conflict: wanting to join the husband's flight.
- Shows the protagonist's determination to achieve her goal.
- Builds anticipation for how she will convince him.
scenes.supernova_on_screen_text:
दोस्तों, मेरे पति की एम्स्टर्डम की फ्लाइट है। (Friends, my husband has a flight to Amsterdam.)
पिछली बार मैं नहीं जा पाई थी, (I couldn't go last time,)
पर इस बार मुझे उनके साथ जाना है! (But this time I want to go with him!)
टारगेट वहाँ है। (The target is over there.)
आसान तो नहीं लग रहा। (It doesn't look easy.)
पर मैं भी हार नहीं मानूंगी... (But I won't give up either...)
एम्स्टर्डम तो देखकर ही रहूंगी! (I will definitely see Amsterdam!)

scenes.supernova_script:
Character A says: फटाफट Supernova ऐप खोलती हूँ। [Quickly opening the Supernova app.]
Character A says: पति को फ्लाइट पर ले चलने के लिए मनाने का रोलप्ले बनाते हैं। [Let's create a roleplay to convince my husband to take me on the flight.]
Character C says: You know, darling, flying with me is not as simple as it sounds—it involves a lot of rules and safety checks. What makes you want to come along on the flight? [You know, darling, flying with me is not as simple as it sounds—it involves a lot of rules and safety checks. What makes you want to come along on the flight?]
Character A says: बाप रे, ये AI तो बिल्कुल रियल पति की तरह स्ट्रिक्ट है! [Oh my, this AI is strict just like a real husband!]
Character A says: मैं भी पीछे नहीं हटूंगी, फुल प्रैक्टिस करूंगी। [I won't back down either, I'll practice fully.]
Character A says: टारगेट थोड़ा मान रहा है। [The target is agreeing a bit.]
Character A says: मैं बस कॉन्फिडेंस से इंग्लिश में बात करती रहूंगी। [I'll just keep talking in English with confidence.]
Character A says: वाओ! गलती करते ही इसने तुरंत करेक्ट कर दिया। [Wow! It corrected me immediately as soon as I made a mistake.]
Character A says: मेरी इंग्लिश एकदम पॉलिश हो रही है। [My English is getting completely polished.]
Character A says: मैंने कहा मुझे एम्स्टर्डम में फ्रेंच फ्राइज़ खाने हैं तो... [I said I want to eat french fries in Amsterdam, so...]
Character C says: Definitely! "Vleminckx" is one of the most beloved fries stands in Amsterdam, known for its [Definitely! "Vleminckx" is one of the most beloved fries stands in Amsterdam, known for its]
Character A says: मेरे AI ट्यूटर ने तो बेस्ट जगह भी बता दी! क्या मस्त फीचर है। [My AI tutor even told me the best place! What an awesome feature.]
Character A says: जल्दी से गूगल मैप्स पर सेव कर लेती हूँ। [Let me quickly save it on Google Maps.]
Character A says: साथ में घूमने की जगह भी पूछ लेती हूँ। [I'll ask for places to visit as well.]
Character C says: Of course! Amsterdam offers charming canals, the Van Gogh Museum, and the Anne Frank House, which many find deeply moving. Are you more interested in art, history, or simply enjo [Of course! Amsterdam offers charming canals, the Van Gogh Museum, and the Anne Frank House, which many find deeply moving. Are you more interested in art, history, or simply enjo]
Character A says: वाओ, पूरी ट्रैवल प्लानिंग हो गई? Supernova के AI ट्यूटर्स सच में कमाल हैं। [Wow, the whole travel planning is done? Supernova's AI tutors are really amazing.]
scenes.scene_summary:
- Demonstrates the app's core feature: custom AI roleplay for real-world situations.
- Highlights instant feedback and correction capabilities.
- Shows the AI's conversational depth by providing real-world travel advice, proving it's more than just a basic language tool.
scenes.supernova_on_screen_text:
फटाफट Supernova ऐप खोलती हूँ। (Quickly opening the Supernova app.)
पति को फ्लाइट पर ले चलने के लिए मनाने का रोलप्ले बनाते हैं। (Let's create a roleplay to convince my husband to take me on the flight.)
बाप रे, ये AI तो बिल्कुल रियल पति की तरह स्ट्रिक्ट है! (Oh my, this AI is strict just like a real husband!)
मैं भी पीछे नहीं हटूंगी, फुल प्रैक्टिस करूंगी। (I won't back down either, I'll practice fully.)
टारगेट थोड़ा मान रहा है। (The target is agreeing a bit.)
मैं बस कॉन्फिडेंस से इंग्लिश में बात करती रहूंगी। (I'll just keep talking in English with confidence.)
वाओ! गलती करते ही इसने तुरंत करेक्ट कर दिया। (Wow! It corrected me immediately as soon as I made a mistake.)
मेरी इंग्लिश एकदम पॉलिश हो रही है। (My English is getting completely polished.)
मैंने कहा मुझे एम्स्टर्डम में फ्रेंच फ्राइज़ खाने हैं तो... (I said I want to eat french fries in Amsterdam, so...)
मेरे AI ट्यूटर ने तो बेस्ट जगह भी बता दी! क्या मस्त फीचर है। (My AI tutor even told me the best place! What an awesome feature.)
जल्दी से गूगल मैप्स पर सेव कर लेती हूँ। (Let me quickly save it on Google Maps.)
साथ में घूमने की जगह भी पूछ लेती हूँ। (I'll ask for places to visit as well.)
वाओ, पूरी ट्रैवल प्लानिंग हो गई? Supernova के AI ट्यूटर्स सच में कमाल हैं। (Wow, the whole travel planning is done? Supernova's AI tutors are really amazing.)

scenes.supernova_script:
Character A says: मैं रेडी हूँ। टारगेट एप्रोच! [I'm ready. Target approach!]
Character A says: I want to ask you something. [I want to ask you something.]
Character B says: Mm. [Mm.]
Character A says: Can I follow your flight? [Can I follow your flight?]
Character B says: Oh, why do you want to come on my flight? [Oh, why do you want to come on my flight?]
Character A says: Because it's the first layover of this year and I want to spend quality time with you. [Because it's the first layover of this year and I want to spend quality time with you.]
Character B says: Okay. [Okay.]
Character A says: अरे, ये तो बड़ा आसान था! [Oh, this was so easy!]
scenes.scene_summary:
- The payoff: Character A successfully uses her practiced English in real life.
- Shows the husband's positive and easy reaction, validating her effort.
- Delivers a satisfying emotional resolution to the setup.
